rationale: TASK-052 acceptance met: scoped change claims are implemented as temporary leases with arbitrary scopes, optional task/build anchors, TTL/release/heartbeat/list behavior, read/write warning and write/write conflict detection, graph/status/state exposure, docs/skills updates, smoke coverage, and archived task id reuse prevention.

issues.summary: Live Pi must reload before the new codewiki_claim tool and claims include schema are available.
First slice is local-file coordination, not distributed cross-machine locking.
